scripts.dev: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --build | docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml down
scripts.dev-prod: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev-prod.yml up -d --build | docker compose -f docker-compose.dev-prod.yml down
scripts.dev:add-route: bun run scripts/dev/add-route.ts && bun run prettier
